close_reason: Cannot reproduce - the mold-wrapped deprecation warning is no longer appearing. May have been fixed in a recent nixpkgs update (current: Jan 8, 2026). Reopen if it reappears.
description: During Nix evaluation, there's a warning: 'mold-wrapped' has been renamed to 'mold'. Need to find where this comes from in our flake/devenv config and update it.
title: Fix mold-wrapped deprecation warning
